reviews.comment:
Mucho movimiento de vehículos, poco personal en la playa, señores del ACA, ya terminó la temporada para ustedes?

(Translated by Google)
Lots of vehicle traffic, few staff on the beach, ACA officials, is the season over for you already?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbE16WlB3EAE

reviews.comment:
Realmente me gustó, muy cómodo, buena atención y hay un restaurante muy cerca con buna comida, el único inconveniente las medias lunas del desayuno, realmente muy prefabricadas, no me gustaron para nada.

(Translated by Google)
I really liked it, very comfortable, good service and there is a restaurant very close with good food, the only drawback was the croissants for breakfast, really very pre-made, I didn't like them at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNU9xTUVBEAE
